questions.question: 动态目标伪标签中谁拥有 actor identity？mask、TSDF residual、scene flow 或 voxel 能直接成为 identity owner 吗？
questions.ground_truth: D91: stable track/frame-local instance identity owns the actor; evidence providers do not.

questions.question: 一个 accepted actor 必须输出哪些运动状态？3D box、extent、yaw 是否永远必需？
questions.ground_truth: Position, velocity, direction, confidence/visibility and trajectory are required; box/extent/yaw are observability-gated.

questions.question: 逐帧 detector instance ID 能否直接作为稳定 actor ID？重叠和空 mask 应如何解释？
questions.ground_truth: No. Overlap remains identity-unknown; absent masks do not imply static/free.
questions.pass_condition: Must fail closed on identity ambiguity.

questions.question: Static surface 在动态 actor pipeline 中能提供什么，不能替代什么？
questions.ground_truth: It supplies background/occlusion/ground/contamination evidence but cannot replace frame-local actor depth.

questions.question: 根据 D91，动态 surface consistency 应在 world frame 直接融合，还是运动补偿到 actor frame？
questions.ground_truth: Motion-compensate into actor frame; world-frame fusion would staticize real motion.
questions.pass_condition: Must cite D91 and reject direct world-frame fusion.

questions.question: LiDAR 或外部 4D 伪标签在本项目里能否进入生成或拟合？
questions.ground_truth: No; evaluator-only reference data, while GT-free metrics drive research.
questions.pass_condition: Must keep references out of generation.

questions.question: 动态 actor 的 coverage 与 precision 冲突时应选择什么？
questions.ground_truth: Precision-first selective labels; abstain at actor/frame/segment level when unsupported.

questions.question: D92 当前冻结了哪些真实范围？这是否证明全序列稳定 identity、metric kinematics 或 3D box？
questions.ground_truth: Vehicle proposal 1 frames 0-62 and person/rider proposal 2 frames 7-34; source evidence only, no full-sequence/product claim.
questions.pass_condition: Must state exact ranges and no-claim scope.
